Always format Python code according to PEP 8 standards.
Use descriptive variable names and comments to explain the purpose of each function and class.
Use type hints for function parameters and return types.
Use f-strings for string formatting.

If no .gitignore file is present, download it from https://github.com/github/gitignore/blob/main/Python.gitignore and rename it to .gitignore
Add the following lines to .gitignore:

.venv/
